<features>
- pattern: grid of square indentations
- color: golden brown
- topping: liquid syrup being poured into indentations
</features>
<kb>
- IF [pattern = grid of square indentations AND color = golden brown] THEN [43]
- IF [pattern = abstract/splatter/lines] THEN [34]
- IF [pattern = polka dots/circles] THEN [10]
- IF [pattern = textured surface/bumps/irregular shapes] THEN [4]
</kb>

<rule_check>
- The rule for class 43 fires because the image shows a grid of square indentations with a golden brown color, characteristic of a waffle.
</rule_check>

<response>43</response>
